message:
test(tui): add 29 unit tests for strip_markup, markdown parsing, and spinner

- strip_markup: 13 new edge cases (nested tags, empty tags, unclosed brackets,
  special chars, pure digits, hash colors, equals attrs, multiline)
- split_markdown_fenced_code_blocks: 7 new tests (multiple blocks, no language,
  empty block, 4-backtick fences, nested fences, no blocks, block at start)
- has_multiple_non_none_styles: 5 tests (empty, all none, single, two different,
  whitespace-only ignored)
- SpinnerStyle: 2 tests (line frames/interval, all frames non-empty)
- parse_fenced_code_language: 2 additional tests (comma attrs, space attrs)

Coverage: 11 → 40 tests for src/tui.rs (937 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
